task_statement: FINAL architecture first safe god-module shrink. Implement the conservation-ledger move recorded in project/brick-protocol/status/kernel/customer-ready-final-architecture-conservation-ledger-0630.md. Move exactly the fake-CLI completion fixture helper cluster from support/checkers/lib/case_runners.py into one new flat sibling support/checkers/lib/preset_completion_fixture.py, preserving function bodies byte-identically and re-exporting the six private helper names from case_runners.py so all existing call sites and profile cases behave identically. Add exactly one module_registry.yaml row for the new sibling directly after case_runners.py with support/checkers/lib checker-lib ownership only. Do not split kernel_checks, walker/run, profiles, or create folders/module families. Verification: import smoke for all six re-exported names; git diff --check; compileall for support/checkers/lib; PYTHONPATH=support/import_identity:. python3 support/checkers/check_profile.py --all. Mutation-RED probes: on temporary copies or reversible edits only, prove that breaking _is_gemini_json_invocation or removing the re-export makes relevant checks fail, then restore before final return. If mutation probes are too expensive, explicitly return not_proven for that part; do not fake them.

nodes.work_statement: Implement only the conservation-ledger leaf extraction: create support/checkers/lib/preset_completion_fixture.py; move exactly _preset_completion_command_runner, _preset_completion_prompt_from_cli_args, _is_gemini_json_invocation, _output_last_message_path, _deterministic_completion_list, _return_labels_from_cli_prompt from case_runners.py with byte-identical bodies; import/re-export them in case_runners.py; add one module_registry row for the new sibling. Do not change tests/profiles except module_registry. Run the listed verification and report exact commands.

Code-attack QA for the leaf extraction. Inspect the sandbox diff and verify: only the three allowed support/checkers files changed; moved helper bodies are byte-identical; all six names remain importable from support.checkers.lib.case_runners; module_registry row is support-only with no axis ownership; no profiles/checker semantics changed; git diff --check, compileall, and check_profile.py --all are green or any blocker is reported honestly. Do not source-mutate.

Axis-attack QA for the leaf extraction. Verify Brick/Agent/Link boundaries: this is support checker-lib relocation only, no Movement authority, no target selector, no source truth, no success/quality judgment, no new module family/folder hierarchy, no credential/session data. Check the diff against the conservation ledger and report any boundary gap. Do not source-mutate.

Closure synthesis. Read work + both QA returns. If implementation and QA support the conservation ledger, return forward evidence with exact changed files, sandbox commit, frontier limits, commands run, and not_proven. If any implementation_gap or boundary_mismatch remains, raise transition_concern_evidence instead of claiming closure.
